summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Freeman Mobile Cleaning app. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate), but critical calendar UI issue prevents date selection in booking flow.

ui_bugs.issue: Calendar component renders as white box with no visible days or navigation buttons
ui_bugs.impact: Blocks entire booking flow - users cannot select dates

passed_tests: Home page loads with hero section
Service cards clickable and navigate to booking
Form validation on booking details step
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix calendar component rendering issue - react-day-picker not displaying calendar days/navigation. This is blocking the entire booking flow as users cannot select dates.
